```json
  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Gas flex connector routed through cabinet wall creates a penetration that is not protected against damage, abrasion, or heat transfer.",
    "Flexible gas connectors are not permitted to pass through walls, floors, ceilings, or cabinet partitions in concealed or protected locations per standard gas piping practice and appliance connector restrictions.",
    "The installation as observed is incomplete and non-compliant; the connector must be accessible, protected, or replaced with rigid/black-iron piping where it penetrates the enclosure.",
    "Sequence violation: the gas connection method should have been verified against manufacturer instructions and code before the water heater was set and connected."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on the gas connection immediately.",
    "Remove the flexible gas connector from the cabinet wall penetration.",
    "Install proper rigid gas piping or an approved protected connection method through the cabinet wall, maintaining required clearances and support.",
    "Verify appliance connector length and routing per manufacturer instructions and IRC/IPC fuel-gas provisions.",
    "Have the gas piping inspected/tested (pressure/leak test) before returning the water heater to service."
  ],
  "rationale": "A gas flex connector passing through a cabinet wall is a code and safety violation. Flexible appliance connectors are intended for short, accessible connections between the appliance gas valve and the house piping; they cannot be concealed or pass through walls/cabinets. The observed condition creates leak and fire hazards and must be corrected before the installation proceeds or is placed in service.",
  "references": [
    "IRC P2804 / fuel-gas appliance connector installation",
    "IPC 504 / water heater installation and fuel-gas connections",
    "Manufacturer water heater installation instructions for gas connector routing"
  ]
}
```
